rationale: The code faithfully implements Task 4a strictly within the frozen v13 scope. The closed inventory commits exactly the required spine roots, exclusion roots, documents, contracts, and exactly the frozen normative tables (including REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS and LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS). The shared D33 classifier and resolver are implemented in util.mjs, exported for both derivation and advisory usage, and test-closure.mjs proves the committed git and code weaver inventories equal their recursively derived closures. The driver-held counted iterator, fail-closed physical containment, Phase-1 export scanner, and no-shell git wrapper are accurate. Code and git weavers deterministically enforce their extraction logic and emit edges to specification, including all endpoint shapes and correct git argument bounds. All deterministic verifier checks passed.
